text.message: if only it made me better at the game lmao
i guess you paid for it?
Yes but only once about 5 years ago or so. It's the founder's pack (kinda like a supporting payment for the game in the early days)
Was like $100ish for all game modes forever, the gold color, and the hat
super worth it compared to the crazy subscription prices now. yeah I'm super glad I got it
im trying to get to know the founders, i think this game has a lot of potential
how do you get to know the founders
ask until you find someone who knows them
see what they need. capital or dev work
I think they do job postings re: dev work, but yeah getting in touch is a good idea if you'd like to invest
need to run tournaments, get this off discord and put some sponsors behind it. thatll attract a lot of people
yeah I won't solo you every time but rn you strong
